quote: le dépôt cartographié par graphify (677 nœuds, 21 communautés) puis distillé en pages pilotes via la passe d'enrichissement multi-LLM du 2026-07-14
note: Page states 21 communities for the graphify-mapped repo; GRAPH_REPORT.md line 8 and graph.json both report 48 communities (26 shown, 22 thin omitted) for the same 677-node/1204-edge run. No cited source supports the figure 21 -- it does not match GRAPH_REPORT.md, graph.json, or the archived raw source (which only states 677 nodes/1204 edges, no community count). Node count (677) is correct; community count (21) is not.
